name: slides
description: Zero-dependency HTML presentation generator with safe presets, bold template-library styles, PPT conversion, and anti-AI-slop design philosophy.

interface.longDescription: Create zero-dependency, animation-rich HTML presentations from scratch or by converting PowerPoint files. The skill guides content discovery, visual style previews, fixed 16:9 HTML slide generation, deployment, and PDF export.
defaultPrompt: Create a pitch deck from my notes
Convert this PowerPoint into a web slideshow
